briefs.theme: Trump holds a meeting to make a final determination on the US-Iran draft truce deal, while Anthropic launches Claude Opus 4.8, and Brussels starts a tougher China trade policy.

Russia signs military pact deal with Taliban, may benefit India and unsettle Pakistan
